meta.title: Websites, servers and tools for your business | {brand}
meta.description: I build your website, move your server or make the tool you are missing. You get it in a week. If it doesn't work for you, you don't pay.
meta.keywords: business website, booking website, server move, server security review, custom internal tool, website maintenance
meta.ogAlt: {brand}: websites, servers and tools for your business.

footer.tagline: Websites, servers and tools for businesses of 1 to 100 people.
footer.builtNote: This page uses no tracking cookies and no analytics.

hero.eyebrow: What you are missing or what just broke, ready in a week.
hero.h1Lead: Websites and servers with someone behind them who picks up the phone.
hero.h1Accent: If it doesn't work for you, you don't pay.
hero.sub: I build your website, move your server or make the tool you are missing. You get it in a week, and you always speak to the person building it.
trust: The domain and the code sit in your name

panel.label: Typical job
panel.title: What {price} gets you
panel.intro: A business starting from nothing gets this, built and running.
items: As many pages as the job needs, with the copy written
Opens in under two seconds on a phone
You show up when someone searches your trade and your area
The form reaches your inbox and your phone
Legal notice and privacy policy done
panel.note: If your case needs less, I take it out and the number drops. You get it in writing before I start.
panel.deliveryValue: {min} to {max} days once I have your material
panel.waMessage: Hi Kamil, I run a business and I want to tell you about my case.

services.title: What I can build you
services.sub: Each number covers the whole job, with no extras added later.

web.name: New website
web.pitch: Someone searches for what you sell, finds you and calls. That is the only goal.
includes: As many pages as the job needs, with the copy written
Opens in under two seconds on a phone
You show up when people search your trade and your area
The form reaches your inbox and your phone
Legal notice and privacy policy done

panel.name: Website with bookings or orders
panel.pitch: Your customer books at eleven at night and you see it in the morning from your phone.
includes: Calendar, bookings or orders, depending on what you sell
A panel where you change hours, prices and slots without calling me
Card and Bizum payments when the job needs them
Runs on a server I look after, or on yours if you prefer

tool.name: A tool built for you
tool.pitch: Tell me the task that eats your morning and I put it on one screen.
includes: Turn 200 orders in a spreadsheet into labels with one click
Your technicians clock in from their phones and you see the hours at month end
If it replaces a fee you already pay, I charge what three months of it would cost
You get the number before I start, same as everything else
The data stays on your server, not mine

migration.name: Server move
migration.pitch: Your site changes address on a Tuesday at three in the morning and your customers never notice.
includes: Full copy before anything gets touched
DNS, certificates and the mail hanging off the domain
The cutover happens outside your working hours
If something fails, I roll back in minutes
You see the hosting bill before and after

audit.name: Security review
audit.pitch: I tell you which doors sit open, and I close the ones that close the same afternoon.
includes: What a passer-by sees of your server right now
The serious findings first, not a dump of 300 warnings
A script that fixes what fixes itself
Written so you understand it without calling me

maintenanceNote.label: Optional maintenance, {price} a month
maintenanceNote.body: I cover your back on any of the jobs above, with no lock-in. If you would rather run it yourself, you don't pay it.

process.title: Four steps and no hour-long meetings
process.sub: I don't start until we both know what I deliver and on what day.

steps.name: You tell me what is breaking
steps.detail: A WhatsApp message or the form. I need two things: what bothers you, and when you want it.

steps.name: I send the scope sheet
steps.detail: One page with what I do, what I don't do, the date and the number. If something looks wrong, we fix it there.

steps.name: I build it
steps.detail: One to seven days, counting from the moment I have your material: text, logo and access. I show you progress through whichever channel you pick.

steps.name: You look at it and decide
steps.detail: If it works for you, pay by bank transfer or Bizum. If it doesn't, I close it and no invoice exists.

process.scopeNote: This is the document from step 2. Read it before you write to me.

guarantee.title: If it doesn't work for you, you don't pay
guarantee.body: You review what I delivered and you tell me. I close it there, with no invoice and no argument. I ask for no deposit and nothing up front.

points.name: You start without paying
points.detail: I ask for no deposit to get to work.

points.name: The code is yours
points.detail: Site, configuration and domain sit in your name from day one.

points.name: No lock-in
points.detail: Cancel maintenance whenever you want, with no notice period.

about.title: There are two of us
about.lead: I build the technical side. My partner talks to you and runs the numbers.
body: He picks up the phone, works out what your business needs and gives you a date and a number. Twenty years negotiating with suppliers and customers across three continents sit behind that call, so he reads a deadline and a set of figures before you finish explaining them.

I keep around 200 Linux stations running on an Amazon production line. When one dies, that part of the floor stops with people waiting in front of it, so I fix fast and write it down so it doesn't happen twice.
This page is built the way I build yours: no templates, no trackers and nothing loading from outside.

faq.title: What people ask before hiring us

items.q: What happens if I don't like the result?
items.a: You don't pay. You review it, you tell me it doesn't serve you and I close it there. I issue no invoice, claim nothing, and you keep whatever already sits in your name.

items.q: What if I need less than what is listed?
items.a: I take out what you won't use and the number drops. You get it in writing in the scope sheet, before I touch anything.
Yes. The number you see on each service is the number you pay.

One to seven days, and the clock starts the day I have all your material: text, logo and access. A simple site lands in two. A move with mail and certificates runs to five or seven. The exact date goes in writing before I start.

items.q: Can I ask for something that isn't on the list?
items.a: Yes. Tell me the task that eats your morning and I tell you whether it can be done, what it costs and when you get it.

items.q: I pay a monthly fee for a tool. Can you get rid of it?
items.a: Sometimes. I check whether an equivalent exists that you can host yourself. If it does, I set it up and charge what three months of that fee would cost. If it doesn't, I say so and charge nothing. I stay away from invoicing and anything with a legal obligation attached.
Outside this website. Bank transfer or Bizum once the work sits in front of you and you have approved it. This page takes no payments and stores no banking data.

items.q: Do you ask for a deposit?
items.a: No. I start with nothing up front and carry the risk that you won't like it.
Yes. The domain registers in your name, the code gets handed to you and the hosting sits in your account. Tomorrow you can take everything without asking me.

items.q: What do you need from me to start?
items.a: The text you want to show, your logo if you have one, and access to the domain if you already bought it. If you have none of that, I write a first draft and you correct it.
Remotely, with clients in Spain and abroad. In Madrid I come in person when the job needs it, for example to touch a server that never reaches the internet.

items.q: I already have a website and I don't want to change it
items.a: Then look at the move or the review. I can shift what you have to a cheaper server, or tell you where it sits exposed, without touching the design.
Yes, with full tax details, always after you approve the work.

items.q: What do you do with my data?
items.a: I keep your name and your contact so I can reply, nothing else. I sell no data, run no advertising and set no tracking. The privacy policy spells it out.

contact.title: Tell me what is breaking
contact.sub: Three fields. I reply within {hours} hours, Monday to Sunday.
contact.consent: I have read the privacy policy and agree to you using my details to reply.

need.label: What you need
need.placeholder: Example: my site takes nine seconds to open and I am losing calls.

success.title: Message received
success.body: I reply within {hours} hours to the contact you left. If you are in a hurry, message me on WhatsApp and we sort it now.

errors.name: Write your name.
errors.need: Tell me in one sentence what you need.
errors.contact: Leave an email or a phone number so I can reply.
errors.contactFormat: That doesn't look like an email or a phone number.
errors.consent: I need your permission to use the contact details you give me.
errors.network: The form didn't send. Message me on WhatsApp or by email and we sort it out.
errors.tooFast: Wait a second and send again.

legalNotice.title: Legal notice
legalNotice.pendingBanner: This legal notice is pending completion with the owner's tax details. The marked fields get filled in once self-employed registration finishes.

p: Owner: {legalName}
Tax ID: {taxId}
Address: {registeredAddress}
Contact email: {email}
Website: {baseUrl}
This site describes the web development, server migration, infrastructure review and custom tooling services the owner provides. Browsing the site makes you a user and means you accept these terms.
You may read and download the content of this site for your own use. You may not reproduce it commercially without the owner's written permission.
The owner accepts no liability for damage arising from use of the site other than as intended.
Published prices include VAT and cover the scope described for each service. The firm price, the scope and the delivery date get fixed in the scope sheet you receive before work starts.
If the job needs less work than described, the number drops and the scope sheet records it.
This site processes no payments. Payment happens off the website by bank transfer or Bizum, once the work is delivered and approved.

If the delivered work does not satisfy you, you do not pay and no invoice gets issued. This guarantee covers the scope agreed in writing. It does not cover work already approved and invoiced, nor third-party costs you contracted in your own name, such as domains or hosting.
The code, text and designs delivered to you become yours once the work is paid for. Third-party components keep their original licence.
Trademarks and logos on this site belong to their respective owners.
This site is hosted by {hostingProvider}.
These terms fall under Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts of the consumer's domicile where the consumer qualifies as such.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data I collect, what I use it for and how you get it deleted. Written to be understood.
summary: I only collect what you type into the contact form.
I use it to reply to you and for nothing else.
No tracking cookies, no analytics, no third-party fonts.
Ask me to delete it and I delete it.

p: Controller: {legalName}
Tax ID: {taxId}
Contact: {email}
From the contact form: the name you type, the description of what you need, the email or phone you leave, and the channel you prefer for a reply.
I collect no browsing data. This site installs no analytics or advertising cookies, loads no third-party fonts or scripts, and uses no tracking pixels.
The server hosting the page records your IP address in its technical logs, which happens on any web server and serves the security of the service.

sections.h: What I use it for and on what legal basis
p: I use your data to answer your enquiry and, if you hire me, to run the job and issue the invoice.
The legal basis is your consent when you tick the box on the form, and performance of a contract once we start working together. Invoicing records get kept because the law requires it.
If we never end up working together, I delete your enquiry after {retention} months.
If you hire me, I keep the invoicing data for the periods Spanish tax law requires.
The form gets processed by {processorName}, with servers in the United States. That provider receives the form content in order to pass it to me by email. You can read their policy on their own site.
Hosting is handled by {hostingProvider}.
I sell your data to nobody and share it with nobody else. There are no advertisers.

sections.h: If you would rather skip the form
p: Write to {email} or message me on WhatsApp. That way your data never passes through the form provider.
You can ask me for access to your data, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, and you can object to processing. Write to {email} and I answer within one month.
If you believe I have not complied, you can complain to the {authority}.

This site sets no cookies. It stores one technical value in your browser: the language you pick, so it stops asking. That value never leaves your device, identifies nobody, and you clear it by clearing site data in your browser.
That is why you see no cookie banner: there is nothing to consent to.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.body: The link you followed leads nowhere. Go back to the start, or write to me and I tell you where to find what you were after.

scopeDoc.subtitle: What I deliver, what I don't, when and for how much.
scopeDoc.intro: This document records the work agreed before anything starts. If something looks wrong, we correct it here and sign again.

p: A closed list of the work, detailed enough for you to check every point.
Each point counts as delivered once you see it running.
Anything missing from the list above sits outside the job. Ask for it later and it gets quoted separately.
Between 1 and 7 calendar days, counting from the moment I receive all the agreed material. The exact date goes here.
The agreed number, VAT included. If the scope drops, the number drops with it.
No deposit. You pay by bank transfer or Bizum after approving the work.
If the delivered work does not serve you, you do not pay and no invoice gets issued.
The guarantee covers this scope. It does not cover work already approved and invoiced, nor third-party costs contracted in your name.
The code, the configuration and the domain sit in your name from day one. You can take them to another supplier without asking.

scopeDoc.footerNote: Mechidan. This document does not replace the invoice.
